message:
feat(opentui): add input simulation module for E2E testing

- Add input_sim module to tests/common for keyboard/mouse input simulation
- Export input_sim from tests/common/mod.rs
- Sync beads issue tracker state

This module enables more comprehensive E2E testing by providing
utilities to simulate user input events in terminal applications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+[package]
+name = "opentui-fuzz"
+version = "0.0.0"
+authors = ["Automatically generated"]
+publish = false

+
+[package.metadata]

+
+[dependencies]
+libfuzzer-sys = "0.4"
+arbitrary = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
+
+[dependencies.opentui]
+path = ".."

+# Fuzz targets - each corresponds to a file in fuzz_targets/
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_input_parser"

+
+[profile.release]
